title: Orthodon leucanthus

taxonomy: Orthodon leucanthus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is native to Africa, and its classification is further detailed within the subfamily Vaccinioideae. The plant belongs to the genus Orthodon, which is characterized by its distinct characteristics and growth habits. Orthodon leucanthus is closely related to other Vaccinioideae species, sharing similarities in its leaf and flower morphology. Further research into its specific classification may provide additional insights into its evolutionary relationships.
